questions.question: बच्चों लाओ फिर वही ________।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: Children, bring back that same ________.

English meaning of the answer: The answer is message.

questions.question: मिलें-जुलें, हो ________ का साथ।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: Let us live together with ________.

English meaning of the answer: The answer is love.

questions.question: पास-पड़ोसी सुख-दुख ________।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: Neighbours should ________ joys and sorrows.

English meaning of the answer: The answer is share.

questions.question: ऐसे हों सबमें ________।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: Such ________ should exist in everyone.

English meaning of the answer: The answer is feelings.

questions.question: पंथ अलग हैं, ________ एक है।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: Paths are different, ________ is one.

English meaning of the answer: The answer is religion or faith.

questions.question: सबमें ________ वही एक है।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: The same ________ is present in everyone.

English meaning of the answer: The answer is God.

questions.question: रक्त सभी का ________ एक है।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: Everyone's blood is ________.

English meaning of the answer: The answer is red.

questions.question: दिन-नित बढ़े ________ का हाथ।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: May the hand of ________ grow day by day.

English meaning of the answer: The answer is love.

questions.question: जग का अर्थ ________ है।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: जग means ________.

English meaning of the answer: The answer is world.

questions.question: पीर का अर्थ ________ है।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: पीर means ________.

English meaning of the answer: The answer is sorrow.

questions.question: मतभेद का अर्थ विचारों में ________ है।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: मतभेद means difference in ________.

English meaning of the answer: The answer is opinion.

questions.question: धर्म का अंग्रेज़ी अर्थ ________ है।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: The English meaning of धर्म is ________.

English meaning of the answer: The answer is religion.

questions.question: प्रेम का अंग्रेज़ी अर्थ ________ है।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: The English meaning of प्रेम is ________.

English meaning of the answer: The answer is love.

questions.question: चाँदनी का अंग्रेज़ी अर्थ ________ है।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: The English meaning of चाँदनी is ________.

English meaning of the answer: The answer is moonlight.

questions.question: 31 का हिंदी रूप ________ है।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: The Hindi word for 31 is ________.

English meaning of the answer: The answer is इकतीस.

questions.question: 40 का हिंदी रूप ________ है।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: The Hindi word for 40 is ________.

English meaning of the answer: The answer is चालीस.

questions.question: जनवरी के बाद ________ आता है।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: After January comes ________.

English meaning of the answer: The answer is February.

questions.question: मार्च के बाद ________ आता है।
questions.explanation:
English meaning of the question: After March comes ________.

English meaning of the answer: The answer is April.
